title: teline linifolia subsp. rosmarinifolia
intro: Teline linifolia subsp. rosmarinifolia, also known as upright broom or upright broom broom, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Teline linifolia subsp. rosmarinifolia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
